item.name: Wind-up Runar
item.description:
Because a single Runar pining for Master Matoya isn't enough.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Runar minion.
item.tooltip:
Please, Runar, dry your tears.
What would the others think
if they saw you like this?
   - Master Matoya
item.specialactiondescription: Grants 10 action points to all allies within range who do not have similar actions.
